sourcePrompt: An Ithaca 37 pump-action 12-gauge shotgun, the close-quarters "Tunnel Rat" weapon, about a meter long. A compact shotgun with a tubular magazine running under the barrel, a grooved wooden pump slide wrapped around that tube, a plain walnut buttstock, a small bead front sight, and a clean receiver with the ejection port underneath. Walnut wood and blued steel, short and handy.
